pages.title: Preface
pages.html:
Preface

The present text is a recomposed edition of the book "Cohomologie locale des faisceaux cohérents et théorèmes de Lefschetz locaux et globaux (SGA 2)", Advanced Studies in Pure Mathematics 2, North-Holland Publishing Company - Amsterdam, 1968, by A. Grothendieck et al. It is the second installment of the project begun by B. Edixhoven, who re-edited SGA 1. This version reproduces the original text as faithfully as possible.

The editor, Yves Laszlo.
